company.name: PT. Accelist Lentera Indonesia
company.description: Accelist is Indonesia’s IT consulting company that specializes in custom software development, system integration, and digital transformation across multiple industries.

responsibilities: Delivered fullstack features across web & mobile systems using C# ASP.NET, React.js/Next.js, and React Native, which support multiple enterprise-grade systems.
Resolved critical bugs across internal and external projects that improved system reliability, reduced reporting inconsistencies, and reduced edge-case errors.
Developed scalable frontend components and API integrations, enhancing UX for several systems such as inbox systems, leave management systems, project monitoring systems, etc.

Collaborated in an SDLC (Scrum) team (developers, BA, PM) to deliver iterative releases, contributing to successful sprint deliveries and UAT readiness through active requirement analysis, debugging, and refactoring.

project-i.name: Project I
project-i.description: A system for managing Dealer Finance reports used to process ceiling data and dealer collection reports
contributions: Bug fixes on various reports (Waiting Outstanding, Outstanding Loan, Dealer Payment, Payment Report)
Data processing based on Invoice Number
Fixes for date filters, data validation, and Excel export results
Adjustment of Aging Day calculations according to business logic

project-c.name: Project C
project-c.focus: Displaying employee work history in a company
project-c.description: A website to display employee work history used for monitoring and documenting work activities
contributions: Development of Reply Message component
Development of Admin Inbox page UI
API integration for reply & approval features
UI design adjustments based on admin needs

project-a5.name: Project A5
project-a5.focus: Managing employee leave applications, usage, and records
project-a5.description: A leave system based on journaling (debit / credit) with multi-roles: Employee & Human Capital
contributions: Development of Leave quota mutation page
Backgrounder for automatic leave approval
API integration & UI improvements
Adjustment of leave quota business logic

project-h.name: Project H
project-h.description: A system for monitoring project progress covering requirement, development, and monitoring phases
contributions: UI fixes and adjustments according to Figma
Bug fixing on Role Management & PICA Management features
Code refactoring to improve maintainability
Implementation of role access checking (CRUD)

project-j.name: Project J
project-j.focus: Educational website that serves as a platform to educate and develop young talent across Indonesia
project-j.description: Educational website that serves as a platform for companies to educate and develop young talent across Indonesia
contributions: Development of website page UI
Content fixes for Navbar & Footer
Addition of Gallery & Prize sections
Creation of course certificates (Moodle)
Preparation of Python Competition questions (Junior High & High School)
